title: Exciting Day, Day #2 of Computer Camp @ Home
markdown:
A cat went running around the apartment building, the neighbors brought it to me since they knew I owned a cat. Fortunate for my cat, mine was in my apartment already. The lost cat has a tag with named “Kitty” and the cell phone number of the owner. The cat acted upset and cranky the whole time, which upset my cat. I hope I can keep this guest can an mine from fighting with each other long enough for the owner to pick it up.


In programming news, my son and I put together a simulation, by coincidence, he picked cats as the subject for simulation. He kept wanting to turn it into an MMO, but I ended up steering the applicatin towards a predator prey simulation.


Ok, time to clean the kitty litter box and try to figure out how best to sequester a guest cat.
